payment.page_subtitle: Enter your details to proceed with payment

emergency.description: Tap the SOS button to send an alert instantly. Add a voice note or message for more context (optional).
emergency.message_placeholder: E.g., I'm at the main entrance, wearing red...
emergency.sos_instruction: 💡 SOS button works instantly — add details to help responders
emergency.sos_instruction_alt: Tap SOS to send alert instantly — your contacts will receive your location
emergency.status_recording: ✅ Alert sent! Recording evidence every 15s. Tap 'I'm Safe' when resolved.
emergency.help_notified: ✅ Help has been notified. Stay safe and keep your phone nearby.
emergency.alert_sent_recording: ✅ Alert sent! Help notified. Recording continues until resolved.
emergency.alert_resolved: ✅ Alert resolved. Thank you for staying safe.
emergency.resolve_failed: Failed to resolve alert. Please try again.

safe_path.page_subtitle: Plan your route avoiding high-risk areas.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
